title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology presents an analysis of OpenClaw security risks in autonomous AI agents, covering vulnerabilities including prompt injection and credential exposure. The video examines how agent autonomy, tool integration, and memory mechanisms create exploitable attack surfaces.
